name: Safety and Efficacy of Injectable Klotho Plasmid Gene Therapy in Humans
summary: ClinicalTrials.gov registry for a recruiting single-group phase 1 Minicircle study of injectable plasmid-delivered klotho gene therapy in healthy adult and older adult volunteers, with serum klotho, safety, phosphate-axis, renal, epigenetic-age, brain-age, cognitive, and quality-of-life endpoints and no posted results in the June 4, 2026 API view.
